case_title: SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ENPLOYEES FEDERAL vs. DOSS, LEONARD et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOSS, LEONARD DOSS, CLARISSIA $3,857.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,349.85 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,220.85, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE 	28707 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOSS, LEONARD DOSS, CLARISSIA
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND COUNTER AFFIDAVIT RETURNED SERVED, BY THE SF SHERIFF
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $285.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DOSS, LEONARD DOSS, CLARISSIA
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DOSS, LEONARD DOSS, CLARISSIA

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF AUG-27-1997 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $50.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD. LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
